hyperedges.rationale: These seven agents collectively form the distributed consensus and coordination layer within the RuFlo V3 agent ecosystem, each handling a specific consensus mechanism or supporting function.
Explicitly grouped under RuVector Intelligence System in CAPABILITIES.md, combining SONA, MoE, HNSW, EWC++, Flash Attention, and Int8 Quantization.
These files are all OMK skills stored under .agents/skills/, representing reusable composable capabilities for the Kimi/OMK agent workflow.

hyperedges.label: Core Agent Orchestration Stack
hyperedges.rationale: EXTRACTED: The four core agents (planner, researcher, reviewer, tester) all explicitly use the same Claude Flow v3 platform with shared ReasoningBank, HNSW, GNN, Flash Attention, EWC++, SONA, and AttentionCoordinator capabilities.

hyperedges.label: Flow Nexus Cloud Platform Ecosystem
hyperedges.rationale: EXTRACTED: All flow-nexus agents are part of the Flow Nexus cloud platform, sharing MCP tool conventions, rUv credit economy, E2B sandbox infrastructure, and Queen Seraphina advisory services.

hyperedges.label: GitHub Workflow Automation Suite
hyperedges.rationale: EXTRACTED: github-modes, code-review-swarm, issue-tracker, and cicd-engineer agents all focus on GitHub workflows, sharing Claude Flow swarm coordination, ReasoningBank learning, and GitHub Actions integration.

nodes.label: SendMessage-First Coordination
nodes.rationale: Named agents coordinate via SendMessage, not polling or shared state.

nodes.label: Hierarchical-Mesh Topology
nodes.rationale: Anti-drift topology with max 15 agents, hybrid memory, HNSW and neural enabled.

nodes.label: OpenSIPS 3.6 LTS
nodes.rationale: OpenSIPS 3.6 LTS is the only SIP proxy baseline. Changing it requires a documented architecture decision.

nodes.label: PostgreSQL
nodes.rationale: PostgreSQL is the only database. Do not introduce MySQL, MariaDB, or db_mysql variants.

nodes.label: RTPengine
nodes.rationale: RTPengine is the canonical media relay with public RTP on 10000-20000/udp; backend RTP addresses must not leak externally.

nodes.label: Asterisk
nodes.rationale: Asterisk must stay private with no host-published ports.

nodes.label: Docker-Image-First Delivery
nodes.rationale: OpenSIPS must be delivered through a project-owned Docker image, never bare-metal or VM-first install instructions.

nodes.label: HA1 Hash Credential Storage
nodes.rationale: Store SIP Digest credentials as HA1 hashes only, never plaintext passwords. OpenSIPS must read precomputed HA1 columns.

nodes.label: Topology Hiding
nodes.rationale: Use topology_hiding so backend PBX IPs are never exposed externally. Use topology_hiding('C') as the canonical baseline.

nodes.label: Header Sanitization
nodes.rationale: Remove untrusted inbound headers before using routing metadata; strip Authorization and Proxy-Authorization before forwarding.

nodes.label: Tenant-Scoped Routing
nodes.rationale: Derive dispatcher set from authenticated tenant-scoped PostgreSQL metadata, not hard-coded ds_select_dst.

nodes.label: doc-forensics Agent
nodes.rationale: Detect ambiguity, drift, contradictions in documentation.

nodes.label: opensips-rfc-validator Agent
nodes.rationale: Validate OpenSIPS/RFC claims against canonical sources.

nodes.label: solution-architecture Agent
nodes.rationale: Verify topology, Docker-first, PostgreSQL-only, isolation.

nodes.label: devops-docs Agent
nodes.rationale: Validate Dockerfile, Compose, networks, ports, secrets.

nodes.label: data-specs Agent
nodes.rationale: Validate PostgreSQL DDL, auth schemas, indexes.

nodes.label: implementation-specs Agent
nodes.rationale: Convert architecture into implementable route logic.

nodes.label: socratic-popper-reviewer Agent
nodes.rationale: Challenge assumptions, force falsifiable claims.

nodes.label: MCP Secret Handling
nodes.rationale: Never print, commit, or summarize MCP env, headers, tokens, or provider keys.

nodes.label: omk-repo-explorer
nodes.rationale: Repository exploration skill for efficient codebase mapping without blind full-dump reads.

nodes.label: omk-research-verify
nodes.rationale: Web research and source verification workflow for current technical facts and version-sensitive documentation.

nodes.label: omk-secret-guard
nodes.rationale: Protects sensitive files (env, pem, key, credentials) and prevents secret leakage during coding workflows.

nodes.label: omk-security-review
nodes.rationale: Security review skill covering secrets, auth, injection, XSS, CSRF, unsafe shell commands, and dependency risk.

nodes.label: omk-test-debug-loop
nodes.rationale: Debug loop for failing lint, typecheck, test, and build commands with minimal fixes and repeated verification.

nodes.label: omk-troubleshooting
nodes.rationale: Systematic troubleshooting workflow for build failures, test failures, environment issues, and dependency conflicts.

nodes.label: omk-typescript-strict
nodes.rationale: TypeScript strict-mode standards for Next.js, NestJS, Node.js, React, and full-stack projects.

nodes.label: omk-worktree-team
nodes.rationale: Git worktree based multi-agent team workflow for isolated parallel coding, review, QA, and integration.

nodes.label: react-doctor
nodes.rationale: React, Next.js, Vite, and React Native diagnostics workflow adapted from millionco/react-doctor for OMK.

nodes.label: RuFlo V3 Runtime Configuration
nodes.rationale: RuFlo V3 runtime config specifying hierarchical-mesh topology, max 15 agents, hybrid memory backend with HNSW, SONA learning bridge, and MCP autoStart false on port 3000.

nodes.label: RuFlo V3 Capabilities Reference
nodes.rationale: Comprehensive reference for RuFlo V3 multi-agent coordination: 60+ agents, 26 CLI commands, HNSW vector search, SONA neural learning, Byzantine fault tolerance, MCP server integration.

nodes.label: Code Analyzer Agent
nodes.rationale: Advanced code quality analysis agent performing comprehensive code reviews, security scanning, performance analysis, and technical debt identification.

nodes.label: Code Quality Analyzer
nodes.rationale: Agent config for code quality analysis with read-only restrictions, eslint/prettier detection, and code smell identification.

nodes.label: System Architecture Designer
nodes.rationale: Expert agent for system architecture design, C4/UML diagrams, ADRs, scalability planning, and technology evaluation.

nodes.label: Browser Agent
nodes.rationale: Web automation specialist using agent-browser with AI-optimized snapshots, form interaction, screenshot capture, and multi-session coordination.

nodes.label: Byzantine Coordinator
nodes.rationale: Coordinates Byzantine fault-tolerant consensus protocols with PBFT, malicious actor detection, message authentication, and attack mitigation.

nodes.label: CRDT Synchronizer
nodes.rationale: Implements Conflict-free Replicated Data Types for eventually consistent state synchronization, including G-Counter, OR-Set, LWW-Register, RGA, and delta-state CRDTs.

nodes.label: Gossip Coordinator
nodes.rationale: Coordinates gossip-based consensus protocols for scalable eventually consistent systems with epidemic dissemination and anti-entropy protocols.

nodes.label: Performance Benchmarker
nodes.rationale: Implements comprehensive performance benchmarking for distributed consensus protocols, measuring throughput, latency, resource usage, and adaptive tuning.

nodes.label: Quorum Manager
nodes.rationale: Implements dynamic quorum adjustment and intelligent membership management with network-based, performance-based, and fault-tolerance-based strategies.

nodes.label: Raft Manager
nodes.rationale: Manages Raft consensus algorithm with leader election, log replication, follower management, and consistency verification.

nodes.label: Security Manager
nodes.rationale: Implements comprehensive security mechanisms for distributed consensus protocols, including threshold signatures, zero-knowledge proofs, attack detection, and key management.

nodes.label: Coder Agent
nodes.rationale: Implementation specialist for clean, efficient code with self-learning capabilities via ReasoningBank, HNSW indexing, Flash Attention, GNN-enhanced context, EWC++, and SONA.

nodes.label: HNSW Vector Search
nodes.rationale: Hierarchical Navigable Small World vector search providing 150x-12,500x faster pattern retrieval in RuFlo V3 memory system.

nodes.label: SONA Neural Learning
nodes.rationale: Self-Optimizing Neural Architecture with less than 0.05ms adaptation, part of RuVector intelligence system in RuFlo V3.

nodes.label: EWC++
nodes.rationale: Elastic Weight Consolidation++ preventing catastrophic forgetting in neural learning patterns.

nodes.label: Flash Attention
nodes.rationale: Attention optimization providing 2.49x-7.47x speedup for large context processing in RuFlo V3.

nodes.label: MemoryGraph
nodes.rationale: Knowledge graph with PageRank and community detection for graph-aware ranking blending vector and structural scores.

nodes.label: LearningBridge
nodes.rationale: Self-learning memory component (ADR-049) connecting insights to SONA/ReasoningBank neural pipeline with confidence decay and access boost.

nodes.label: MCP Server
nodes.rationale: Model Context Protocol server integration in RuFlo V3 for agent tool and context exchange.

nodes.label: ADR-049 Self-Learning Memory
nodes.rationale: Architecture Decision Record for self-learning memory comprising LearningBridge, MemoryGraph, and AgentMemoryScope.

nodes.label: PBFT Protocol
nodes.rationale: Practical Byzantine Fault Tolerance three-phase protocol for secure consensus with up to f less than n/3 malicious nodes.

nodes.label: Threshold Signature
nodes.rationale: Cryptographic threshold signature scheme using distributed key generation and Lagrange interpolation for consensus message validation.

nodes.label: Zero-Knowledge Proof
nodes.rationale: Zero-knowledge proof system including Schnorr proofs, range proofs, and Bulletproofs for vote verification.

nodes.label: G-Counter CRDT
nodes.rationale: State-based grow-only counter CRDT supporting only positive increments with merge semantics.

nodes.label: OR-Set CRDT
nodes.rationale: Observed-Remove Set CRDT using unique tags and tombstones for conflict-free add/remove operations.

nodes.label: LWW-Register CRDT
nodes.rationale: Last-Write-Wins Register CRDT resolving conflicts via timestamp and node-id tie-breaking.

nodes.label: RGA CRDT
nodes.rationale: Replicated Growable Array CRDT for collaborative text editing with tombstone-based removal.

nodes.label: Hive-Mind Consensus
nodes.rationale: Queen-led consensus mechanism in RuFlo V3 with strategic/tactical/adaptive queen types and worker role assignments.

nodes.label: planner
nodes.rationale: EXTRACTED: Strategic planning and task orchestration agent defined in .claude/agents/core/planner.md with type coordinator and capabilities including task_decomposition, dependency_analysis, resource_allocation.

nodes.label: researcher
nodes.rationale: EXTRACTED: Deep research and information gathering specialist defined in .claude/agents/core/researcher.md with type analyst and capabilities including code_analysis, pattern_recognition, documentation_research.

nodes.label: reviewer
nodes.rationale: EXTRACTED: Code review and quality assurance specialist defined in .claude/agents/core/reviewer.md with type validator and capabilities including code_review, security_audit, performance_analysis.

nodes.label: tester
nodes.rationale: EXTRACTED: Comprehensive testing and quality assurance specialist defined in .claude/agents/core/tester.md with type validator and capabilities including unit_testing, integration_testing, e2e_testing, performance_testing.

nodes.label: test-long-runner
nodes.rationale: EXTRACTED: Custom test agent designed to handle long-running tasks of 30+ minutes, defined in .claude/agents/custom/test-long-runner.md.

nodes.label: ml-developer
nodes.rationale: EXTRACTED: Machine Learning Model Developer agent defined in both .claude/agents/data/data-ml-model.md and .claude/agents/data/ml/data-ml-model.md, specializing in ML model creation, training, and deployment.

nodes.label: backend-dev
nodes.rationale: EXTRACTED: Backend API Developer agent defined in both .claude/agents/development/dev-backend-api.md and .claude/agents/development/backend/dev-backend-api.md, specializing in REST and GraphQL API development.

nodes.label: cicd-engineer
nodes.rationale: EXTRACTED: GitHub CI/CD Pipeline Engineer agent defined in both .claude/agents/devops/ops-cicd-github.md and .claude/agents/devops/ci-cd/ops-cicd-github.md, specializing in GitHub Actions workflows.

nodes.label: api-docs
nodes.rationale: EXTRACTED: OpenAPI Documentation Specialist agent defined in both .claude/agents/documentation/docs-api-openapi.md and .claude/agents/documentation/api-docs/docs-api-openapi.md, creating OpenAPI 3.0 specifications.

nodes.label: flow-nexus-app-store
nodes.rationale: EXTRACTED: Flow Nexus App Store Agent defined in .claude/agents/flow-nexus/app-store.md, managing application marketplace and template deployment.

nodes.label: flow-nexus-auth
nodes.rationale: EXTRACTED: Flow Nexus Authentication Agent defined in .claude/agents/flow-nexus/authentication.md, handling user registration, login, and session management.

nodes.label: flow-nexus-challenges
nodes.rationale: EXTRACTED: Flow Nexus Challenges Agent defined in .claude/agents/flow-nexus/challenges.md, managing coding challenges, leaderboards, and gamification.

nodes.label: flow-nexus-neural
nodes.rationale: EXTRACTED: Flow Nexus Neural Network Agent defined in .claude/agents/flow-nexus/neural-network.md, managing distributed neural network training and deployment.

nodes.label: flow-nexus-payments
nodes.rationale: EXTRACTED: Flow Nexus Payments Agent defined in .claude/agents/flow-nexus/payments.md, handling rUv credit systems, billing, and subscription management.

nodes.label: flow-nexus-sandbox
nodes.rationale: EXTRACTED: Flow Nexus Sandbox Agent defined in .claude/agents/flow-nexus/sandbox.md, managing E2B sandbox environments for isolated code execution.

nodes.label: flow-nexus-swarm
nodes.rationale: EXTRACTED: Flow Nexus Swarm Agent defined in .claude/agents/flow-nexus/swarm.md, orchestrating multi-agent swarms with hierarchical, mesh, ring, and star topologies.

nodes.label: flow-nexus-user-tools
nodes.rationale: EXTRACTED: Flow Nexus User Tools Agent defined in .claude/agents/flow-nexus/user-tools.md, managing profiles, storage, real-time subscriptions, and platform utilities.

nodes.label: flow-nexus-workflow
nodes.rationale: EXTRACTED: Flow Nexus Workflow Agent defined in .claude/agents/flow-nexus/workflow.md, designing event-driven workflow automation with message queue processing.

nodes.label: code-review-swarm
nodes.rationale: EXTRACTED: Code Review Swarm agent defined in .claude/agents/github/code-review-swarm.md, deploying specialized AI agents for multi-agent code reviews.

nodes.label: github-modes
nodes.rationale: EXTRACTED: GitHub Integration Modes agent defined in .claude/agents/github/github-modes.md, providing workflow orchestration, PR management, and repository coordination.

nodes.label: issue-tracker
nodes.rationale: EXTRACTED: Issue Tracker agent defined in .claude/agents/github/issue-tracker.md, managing intelligent issue creation, progress tracking, and multi-agent collaboration on issues.

nodes.label: Claude Flow
nodes.rationale: EXTRACTED: Agent orchestration platform referenced across core agents (planner, researcher, reviewer, tester) as claude-flow@v3alpha providing hooks, memory, neural training, and swarm coordination.

nodes.label: Flow Nexus
nodes.rationale: EXTRACTED: Cloud platform referenced across flow-nexus agents providing MCP tools for app store, authentication, payments, sandbox, swarm, workflow, neural network, challenges, and user tools.

nodes.label: ReasoningBank
nodes.rationale: EXTRACTED: Pattern storage and retrieval system referenced across multiple agents for learning from past tasks, storing outcomes with reward metrics, and searching similar patterns.

nodes.label: HNSW Indexing
nodes.rationale: EXTRACTED: Hierarchical Navigable Small World indexing technology referenced in core agents for 150x-12,500x faster pattern search.

nodes.label: GNN-Enhanced Search
nodes.rationale: EXTRACTED: Graph Neural Network enhanced search referenced across agents for +12.4% better accuracy in dependency mapping, pattern recognition, and issue detection.

nodes.label: EWC++
nodes.rationale: EXTRACTED: Elastic Weight Consolidation++ referenced across agents for preventing catastrophic forgetting of critical patterns.

nodes.label: SONA
nodes.rationale: EXTRACTED: Self-Optimizing Neural Architecture referenced across agents for <0.05ms adaptation to task patterns.

nodes.label: MoE Routing
nodes.rationale: EXTRACTED: Mixture of Experts routing referenced in planner agent for optimal agent assignment via expert selection.

nodes.label: AttentionCoordinator
nodes.rationale: EXTRACTED: Attention-based coordination mechanism referenced across agents for multi-agent consensus, review coordination, and priority ranking.

nodes.label: MCP Tools
nodes.rationale: EXTRACTED: Model Context Protocol tools referenced in flow-nexus agents and github agents for platform integration.

nodes.label: E2B Sandbox
nodes.rationale: EXTRACTED: E2B sandbox technology referenced in flow-nexus-sandbox agent for isolated execution environments with templates like node, python, react, nextjs.

nodes.label: GitHub Actions
nodes.rationale: EXTRACTED: CI/CD platform referenced in cicd-engineer and github-modes agents for workflow automation and pipeline creation.

nodes.label: OpenAPI 3.0
nodes.rationale: EXTRACTED: API specification standard referenced in api-docs agent for creating compliant API documentation.

nodes.label: rUv Credit
nodes.rationale: EXTRACTED: Credit economy system referenced in flow-nexus-payments, flow-nexus-challenges, and flow-nexus-app-store agents for platform monetization and rewards.

nodes.label: Queen Seraphina
nodes.rationale: EXTRACTED: Advanced advisory entity referenced in flow-nexus-user-tools agent for complex decision consultations and architectural guidance.
